subject: A humanoid figure in a flowing green dress with swirling red energy ribbons at the center of a crowded formal ballroom, surrounded by formally dressed attendees including a blue-skinned figure
description: A wide ballroom scene set in a grand cathedral-like hall with arched windows and pink ambient light. At center, a humanoid figure in a green dress turns mid-stride; flowing red magical energy ribbons trail dramatically from the dress, suggesting an unmasking or sudden revelation of concealed magic. The expression on the central figure is wide-eyed and urgent. Surrounding figures in the crowd include a blue-skinned figure in an orange gown, a figure with a golden crown or headdress at left, and various humanoids in formal attire. The scene reads as a high-society event disrupted by a dramatic reveal.
foreground: Central figure in green dress, flowing red magical energy
background: Crowded ballroom with pink light, arched windows, formally dressed crowd, blue-skinned figure at right
emotion: startled urgency at center; crowd reacts with surprise and alarm
